text: The world feels a little tilted—the slant of the ground and the odd angles in these moments echo what's swirling in my head. I sense uncertainty in the words, as though reality is threatening to dissolve into abstraction, questions piling up with no certain answers. Here, in these hyper-designed spaces, I'm left questioning whether I am out of place or if the place itself is out of time. The intriguing visuals and cryptic conversations invite me to reflect, but they also leave me adrift. The feeling is both unsettling and invigorating—like waking up and not knowing if the dream has ended.
